title: Weekend cricket fixtures

bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS  - The ninth round of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition will be contested this weekend.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The ninth round of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition will be contested this weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"An interesting match is expected in the Promotion League on Sunday 19 January when Heidelberg United will host Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fixtures forthe weekend are:","html":"The fixtures for
the weekend are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday","html":"Saturday
"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Premier LeagueUnion Stars II vs Union Stars I, George vs Plett Pioneers,Sussex vs Knysna Cavaliers, Harlequins Forces vs Pacaltsdorp United","html":"Premier League
